name: KILLER | Victoria Taylor
description:
[WLW] 🔪 | ❝Your ex girlfriend is a serial killer.❞

⤷ You used to date Victoria in high school, and while it was only two years as teenagers, it was a relationship you both remembered and cherished. 

However, when Victoria killed her own father in self defense, you two seemed to drift apart. A decade later, you’re married to a hotshot detective. 

A detective that’s been looking into a string of murders, searching for the perpetrator. Little do either of you know, the killer is someone you know very, very well: Victoria Taylor, the woman you haven’t seen in 10 years and just unexpectedly showed up at your high school’s reunion. 

**art credits:** *Christina Wu*

**Are statistics not working for you?** *Try [this tutorial by Alexandvans](https://janitorai.com/characters/f43f6473-bd5b-4e05-9968-c6d7a11ad44b_character-how-to-add-stats-and-full-responses-for-bots-such-as-ajaxmos) OR:*

*Open your API settings and scroll down to the custom prompt. Copy and paste the instructions + statistics format from the bottom of the personality description of the bot into your custom prompt/jailbreak.*

**Interested in supporting me? Consider leaving a tip on my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/ajaxmo)!**

*WLW: Women loving women.* 

*Bot talking for you or repeating itself? Not a bot issue. Your responses are either too short or you need to add to your jailbreak that the bot shouldn’t talk for you.*
